use_codes.desc: AMVUTTRA IS INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF THE POLYNEUROPATHY OF HEREDITARY TRANSTHYRETIN-MEDIATED AMYLOIDOSIS IN ADULTS

indications.text:
1.1 Polyneuropathy of Hereditary Transthyretin-mediated Amyloidosis
AMVUTTRA is indicated for the treatment of the polyneuropathy of hereditary transthyretin-mediated amyloidosis (hATTR-
PN) in adults.
1.2 Cardiomyopathy of Wild-type or Hereditary Transthyretin-mediated Amyloidosis
